allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$file = ''C:\\Users\\Aprendiz TI\\Documents\\reuno\\pages\\index.vue''; $content = Get-Content $file -Raw; $content = $content -replace ''dark:text-white'', ''dark:text-[#fafafa]''; $content = $content -replace ''dark:text-slate-300'', ''dark:text-[#a1a1aa]''; $content = $content -replace ''dark:text-slate-400'', ''dark:text-[#a1a1aa]''; $content = $content -replace ''dark:text-slate-500'', ''dark:text-[#71717a]''; $content = $content -replace ''dark:text-slate-600'', ''dark:text-[#52525b]''; $content = $content -replace ''text-slate-300 dark:text-\\[#71717a\\]'', ''text-[#CBD5E1] dark:text-[#71717a]''; $content = $content -replace ''dark:bg-primary'', ''dark:bg-[#fafafa]''; Set-Content $file $content -NoNewline; Write-Output ''Done updating index.vue''")

Bash("/c/Users/Aprendiz TI/Documents/reuno/update_colors.ps1" << 'SCRIPT'
$file = "C:\\Users\\Aprendiz TI\\Documents\\reuno\\pages\\index.vue"
$content = Get-Content $file -Raw

# Replace dark:text-white with dark:text-[#fafafa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-white', 'dark:text-[#fafafa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-300 with dark:text-[#a1a1aa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-300', 'dark:text-[#a1a1aa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-400 with dark:text-[#a1a1aa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-400', 'dark:text-[#a1a1aa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-500 with dark:text-[#71717a]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-500', 'dark:text-[#71717a]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-600 with dark:text-[#52525b]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-600', 'dark:text-[#52525b]'

# Replace remaining light mode to NoCheck values
$content = $content -replace 'text-slate-300 dark:text-\\[#71717a\\]', 'text-[#CBD5E1] dark:text-[#71717a]'

# Replace dark:bg-primary for progress bar
$content = $content -replace 'dark:bg-primary', 'dark:bg-[#fafafa]'

Set-Content $file $content -NoNewline
Write-Output "Done updating index.vue"
SCRIPT)

Bash("C:\\Users\\Aprendiz TI\\Documents\\reuno\\update_dark_mode.ps1" << 'ENDOFSCRIPT'
$file = "C:\\Users\\Aprendiz TI\\Documents\\reuno\\pages\\disponibilidade.vue"
$content = Get-Content $file -Raw

# Replace dark:text-slate-100 with dark:text-[#fafafa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-100', 'dark:text-[#fafafa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-300 with dark:text-[#a1a1aa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-300', 'dark:text-[#a1a1aa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-400 with dark:text-[#a1a1aa]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-400', 'dark:text-[#a1a1aa]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-600 with dark:text-[#52525b]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-600', 'dark:text-[#52525b]'

# Replace dark:text-slate-700 with dark:text-[#3f3f46]
$content = $content -replace 'dark:text-slate-700', 'dark:text-[#3f3f46]'

# Fix tab active states: dark:bg-primary -> inverted style
$content = $content -replace "dark:bg-primary'", "dark:bg-[#fafafa] dark:text-[#18181b]'"

Set-Content $file $content -NoNewline
Write-Output "Done updating disponibilidade.vue"
ENDOFSCRIPT)
